description: Experience the best of Sri Lanka in a short, power-packed trip! From the cultural charm of Kandy and the iconic Sigiriya Rock to the misty tea gardens of Nuwara Eliya and the relaxing beaches of Bentota, this express tour gives you a perfect blend of nature, heritage, and coastal beauty — all in just a few days. Ideal for travellers who want a refreshing international getaway without long travel times.
name: EXPRESS SRILANKA
